use_cases: Navigation menus with nested hierarchical options for complex application menus
User settings and preferences panels with grouped action items
Context menus providing quick actions for selected items
Form selection interfaces with categorized choices
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based dropdown menu component providing accessible, nested menu navigation with sub-menus, checkable items, and keyboard navigation support. Uses shadcn/ui-style Tailwind classes with CSS variables for theming, making it suitable for modern SaaS and web applications requiring context menus or hierarchical navigation.
